title: TheRoamers
description: A modpack which provides the very basics for joining TheRoamers server!
body:
# This Modpack contains mods required for joining TheRoamers server! 

The main feature of this modpack is ingame voice chat and optimization for running Minecraft smoothly, while also maintaining viability/compatibility for our server. Any mods that are required to join the server will be added to this pack so keep an eye out for updates/new versions!

By downloading this modpack it makes it easier us to update and add mods to the server while 
making it easy for you to stay up to date and join the server! 

### Mods added:

- Fabric API
- Sodium
- Reese's Sodium Options
- Iris Shaders
- Indium
- View Distance Fix
- ImmediatelyFast
- Simple Voice Chat
- Entity Culling
- [EMF] Entity Model Features
- [ETF] Entity Texture Features
